title: Limniris purdyiformis
taxonomy: Limniris purdyiformis is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family (Orchidaceae). It is a terrestrial orchid, often found in tropical and subtropical regions. Further classification of Limniris purdyiformis may include its genus and species designations, but specific information was not found. This orchid is likely classified within a larger taxonomic group such as the subfamily Orchidoideae. However, detailed classification may require more in-depth botanical research.
